query:
SELECT 
  m.status,
  COUNT(*) AS cnt,
  MAX(m.createdAt) AS latestMsg
FROM messages m
WHERE m.fromMe = 1
AND m.createdAt > DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 24 HOUR)
GROUP BY m.status
ORDER BY cnt DESC

  COUNT(*) AS cnt,
  MAX(m.createdAt) AS latestMsg

GROUP BY m.status
